tasks.title: Add tests to raise cmd/cmdutil from 91.6% to 94%+ statement coverage
tasks.description: Add tests to raise cmd/cmdutil from 91.6% to 94%+ statement coverage
tasks.body: cmd/cmdutil was modified on this branch and currently sits at 91.6% coverage. The 94% threshold applies to all changed packages. Identify uncovered statements with go test -coverprofile and add targeted tests following existing patterns in cmd/cmdutil/app_test.go and cmd/cmdutil/completions_test.go.

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in cmd-cmdutil-coverage-gap is complete and correct

scope.description: Coverage gap tests for cmd/cmdutil: RequireIdentity, storeForCompletion fallback paths, CompleteTaskAddresses edge cases, compareNamespace edge cases, jaccardSimilarity nil guard
criteria: all tests pass with race detector

breadcrumbs.text: Added targeted tests for RequireIdentity (both paths), storeForCompletion (all 4 fallback branches), CompleteTaskAddresses with invalid slug addresses, and compareNamespace with unreadable .md files. Coverage moved from 91.6% to 97.6%.
Audit complete: read all source and test files in cmd/cmdutil, ran build/test/vet/fmt, verified 97.6% coverage. No correctness, safety, or quality issues found in the new test file.

audit.result_summary: Added targeted coverage tests for cmd/cmdutil, moving statement coverage from 91.6% to 97.6%. Tests cover RequireIdentity (nil and configured paths), all four storeForCompletion fallback branches, CompleteTaskAddresses with invalid slug addresses and broken resolvers, compareNamespace with unreadable .md files and all-stop-words content, and jaccardSimilarity nil-guard. Audit confirmed: build, tests (with race detector), vet, and formatting all clean. No correctness, safety, or quality issues found.
